---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Logic Layer
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

One-line description of the proposed feature.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What user pain is it responding to? Link to any related issues or discussion threads.

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you're imagining. Be specific — which layer(s) does it touch (middleware, verification, UI, knowledge base)? What's the expected user-facing behavior?

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you'd rather not go with them. (Helps reviewers see the trade-offs.)

## Impact

- **Scope:** middleware / verification / UI / knowledge base / scripts / docs
- **Risk:** low / medium / high
- **Breaking change?** yes / no
- **Affects:** developers only / end users / both

## Additional context

Sketches, links, prior art, examples from similar tools — anything that helps us evaluate the idea.
